steps.title: Identify what would prove the claim
steps.content: The claim is that putting a work online “increases the number of people who experience that work.” To support this claim, evidence must show that the digital version reaches a larger audience than the physical work alone.

steps.title: Test each choice against the signal
steps.content: Choice A proves the claim: if more people access the online image annually than visit the museum in person, digitization clearly expanded the audience. Choices B, C, and D respectively address critical reception, the museum's reputation as a travel destination, and collection composition—but none show that putting it online increases access. That matches choice A — A is correct.
